title: Sergeant Keroro: The Super Duper Movie 4
titleRomaji: Keroro Gunsou Movie 4: Gekishin Dragon Warriors de Arimasu!
titleEnglish: Sergeant Keroro: The Super Duper Movie 4
titleNative: 超劇場版ケロロ軍曹　撃侵ドラゴンウォリアーズであります！
synonyms: Chou Gekijouban Keroro Gunso: Gekishin Dragon Warriors de Arimasu!
synopsis: Mysterious giant beings called "Ryū no Shippo" (Dragon Tails) appeared across the world. Due to the danger it could bring, the Keroro Platoon did a worldwide research on the Dragon Tails, but Tamama suddenly disappeared during the research. Because of this, the whole platoon started their search for Tamama and ended up in Mont-Saint-Michel, France where they met mysterious girl named Sion, who holds the mysterious Ryū no Hon (Dragon Book). But little they know about the secrets about her and the worldwide calamity that would destroy the entire world, as they know it... (Source: Anime News Network)

title: A Chinese Ghost Story: The Tsui Hark Animation
titleEnglish: A Chinese Ghost Story: The Tsui Hark Animation
titleNative: 小倩
synonyms: チャイニーズ・ゴースト・ストーリー小倩
チャイニーズ・ゴースト・ストーリー スーシン
synopsis: A Chinese Ghost Story is a movie that follows a young man named Ning. After the loss of his girlfriend he works as a debt collector to forget his troubles only to encounter more than he had imagined. Accompanied by his constant companion Solid Gold, Ning ends up in a ghost town and from there the adventure ensues. This movie explores some of China's myths and fantasies as the viewer is taken through a world of drama, romance, and battles between good and evil.

title: CARDFIGHT!! VANGUARD Divinez Season 2
titleNative: カードファイト!! ヴァンガード Divinez Season2
synopsis: The second season of Cardfight!! Vanguard: Divinez. Through his victory with Vanguard at the Fated Clash, Akina has his wish for the health of his sister Hikari fulfilled. Gabwelius, who assembled the owners of the Fated One cards, reveals the truth behind the Fated Clash. Another plush toy Sybilt has appeared as well, gathering the 6 owners of Destined One cards, and announcing the start of the “Destined Showdown” where the winner can have their wish fulfilled. Thus begins the fierce bout where motives and intentions cross, of Fate vs Destiny! (Source: cf-vanguard.com)

title: Rozen Maiden: Dreaming
titleNative: ローゼンメイデン ~ トロイメント
synopsis: As summer break arrives for the students, Jun Sakurada is busily studying on his own in the library, making up for time lost while he had confined himself to his home. Meanwhile, his Rozen Maiden doll, Shinku, has been having troubling dreams of late. The pain and sadness of defeating Suigintou was overwhelming, despite the inevitable battle they waged. After waking suddenly from a nightmare, she finds Suigintou's companion spirit wandering; upon giving chase, she discovers that the seventh Doll-- Barasuishou-- has awakened. She now realizes that Suigintou's fate may very well befall the other Dolls, for the appearance of the last Doll signals the beginning of the end of the Alice Games. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: God Mars
titleNative: 六神合体ゴッドマーズ
synopsis: In the year 1999, humanity begins to advance beyond the solar system. The leader of the planet Gishin, Emperor Zule, aims to conquer the galaxy and ends up in a conflict with Earth as a result. In an act aimed to eliminate the Earth, he sends a baby named Mars to live among humanity. Mars is accompanied by Gaia, a giant robot that utilizes a new power source strong enough to destroy an entire planet. Once Mars grows up, he will destroy the Earth by activating the bomb within Gaia. However, upon arriving on Earth, Mars is adopted into a Japanese family and given the name Takeru. Seventeen years later, Takeru has grown a love for humanity and he refuses to detonate the bomb as ordered by Zule. However, the bomb within Gaia is set to explode if Takeru were ever to die, which would ultimately result in the Earth's destruction. Takeru possesses psychic powers (ESP) and decides to join the Earth defense forces and becomes a member of the Crasher Squad (an elite space defense force) where he

title: Judge
titleNative: 闇の司法官ジャッジ
synopsis: Hoichiro Ohma works in an office. Everybody knows him as a silent, humble man. Even his girlfriend, Nanase, doesn't suspect that he could be something more, but he is. When a person dies as a victim of murder; when someone kills himself with a curse on his lips; when someone's death needs to be judged, he is there, for he is a Judge Of Darkness. Following the Laws Of Darkness, with a book made of human skin and an unusual parrot, he pronounces judgement over living criminals that would otherwise go free. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Handsome na Kanojo
titleNative: ハンサムな彼女
synopsis: Hagiwara Mio is a 14-year-old TV actress who has gotten popular. One day on a set, she meets Kumagai Ichiya, who tells her that her acting "stinks". Mio is hurt by his comments, but she finds that she can't get Ichiya out of her mind. It turns out that Ichiya is a promising director, who directed a music video for Mio's friend Sawaki Aya, an idol singer. After the success of this music video, Ichiya is asked to direct a movie, and he wants Mio to be the heroine, because he feels that she is a "handsome" girl like the actresses of old. How will Mio cope with her feelings toward Ichiya? (Source: T.H.E.M. Anime Review)

title: Heybot!
titleNative: ヘボット!
synopsis: The anime takes place on the screw-shaped island country of Screw Island and follows the "Vocabot" Heybot and his partner, Prince Nejiru as they collect different "Vocab Screws". When the Vocabots wear the Vocab Screws on their heads, they're able to compete in "Vocab Battles," battles for who can think up and tell the best jokes. (Source: Anime News Network)

It contained clips from twenty-nine of Ranma's most memorable opponents from the television series. (Source: furinkan.com/ranma/anime/specials.html)

title: Sasami Magical Girls Club 2
titleNative: 砂沙美☆魔法少女クラブ シーズン2
synopsis: The second season of Sasami☆Mahou Shoujo Club . Sasami has an amazing secret: Magic courses through her veins! But the spunky fifth-grader is not alone, for all over the world girls and boys are awakening to their powers. Under the guise of the Cooking Club and with the guidance of Miss Washu, Sasami and her friends will learn to harness their newfound abilities and come to depend upon one another through thick and thin. (Source: Crunchyroll)
